#Other Information
#1. All depths are calibrated to the driller's pipe tally and are measured from the rotary table.
#
#2. No depth corrections have been made for pipe stretch or compression.
#
#3. All data presented is recorded data, unless otherwise stated.
#
#4. The following smoothing parameters have been applied to the data:
#FE Curves: 0.1524 m interval, 0.183 m coercion distance, gap filled 2 m.
#Gamma Ray Trip Out: 0.1524 m interval, 0.183 m coercion distance, gap filled 3 m.
#
#5. Final Parameters used for Processing as follows:
#
#- Rig down Removal Threshold 68 Microsec
#- Calibration Factor used is 0.96360 for casing ID of 12.48".
#
#6. The POOH (Pull out of hole) curves "Average Hole Diameter", "Minimum
#Diameter" and "Maximum Diameter" have tool offset correction relative to hole center.
#Re-center correction: Yes.
#
#7. The POOH (Pull out of hole) Radius curves are directly calculated from the Standoff, therefore the recentered correction is not applied.
#Re-center correction: No.
#
#8. Gaps observed in trip out caliper data in some intervals due to no picks / no returning echo signal.
#
#
#
